Finding.Description: Low Level Requirements document LL-9.xml content was not provided. Without LL9 content, we cannot verify refinements, dependencies, or traceability (including interaction with LL-LOC-7.1) and naming consistency.
Finding.Solution: Provide the LL-9.xml content (or paste its contents), ensuring that LL-9.x requirements exist, refine the appropriate HL requirements, and declare necessary DependsOn relationships. After delivery, I will generate a formal Answer document with Findings, Justifications, and Implementations and perform full traceability verification including LL-LOC-7.1 interactions and naming propagation.
